meaning: n.[亦作savior] 救星,[The Saviour] 救世主,耶稣基督
examples: The new manager has been hailed as the saviour of the club.
The football community built him up as the saviour of the sport.
And Frankfurter Rundschau said he was the German "saviour in our hour of need".
As his forces moved westwards almost unhindered, he was acclaimed as the country's saviour.
